daos 0.1.0

  • Reference

Formatted timestamp for now

nowf.Rd

A shorthand for format(lubridate::now(), fmt). Useful for constructing file names and log paths with a timestamp baked in.

Usage

nowf(fmt = "%Y%m%d")

Arguments

fmt

Format string as accepted by strftime(). Default is "%Y%m%d" (ISO date without separators).

Value

A single character string with the formatted timestamp.

See also

f() for string interpolation

Examples

nowf()                 # e.g. "20260518"
#> [1] "20260519"
nowf("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")  # e.g. "20260518_143022"
#> [1] "20260519_021018"
nowf("%Y%B")           # e.g. "2026May"
#> [1] "2026May"

# Typical use in file paths:
if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
f("log/{nowf()}/0-check_data.log")
f("data/export_{nowf('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.parquet")
} # }
